notes: PASS. All four gate commands + smoke green. The playable mechanic genuinely exercises 'middleware layers + JWT verify' — NOT a thematic reskin: middleware.ts implements real SHA-256 (NIST FIPS 180-4 vectors) + HMAC-SHA256 (RFC 4231 vectors) + JWT(HS256) sign/verify; makeAuthLayer rejects forged/tampered tokens via constant-time hmacVerify; runPipeline walks layers in order and short-circuits on reject (order-matters is a real L4 mechanic). The Playwright smoke boots WebGL (canvas assertion), drives the deterministic public API to predict each gate for L1/L2/L3, asserts >=1 voxeldojo-schema EVIDENCE record with all required review_context fields (verifier_required=true, scheduler_source=learner-substrate) and curriculum_context (concept+mechanic). PLAN slice complete with subject+concept, player goal, concept->mechanic table, main loop, controls, win/fail states, and learning-gate hooks (unit_id U7-rest-api-auth, evidence field list, pass rule, never-writes-learner-state). Two minor demerits (not PASS-blocking): (1) the screenshot at the canonical output path is STALE — it renders the prior 'WAVE CORRIDOR / Aegis Corridor' iteration (VERSION->VALIDATION->AUTHN->AUTHZ gates) rather than the current 'CHECKPOINT CITY' build (logging->auth->rate-limit walls); the prior evidence.json capture there is likewise from the older aegis-corridor schema. The current smoke writes fresh CHECKPOINT CITY screenshots to .logs/smoke-L{1,2,3}-*.png. (2) bundle-size warning >500kB (three.js inline). Neither breaks the gate. Score 9/10: real cryptographic didactic fit, schema-conformant evidence, complete plan.
